message:
feat(hook): Integrate remote transfer pipeline for compilation offloading

Hook Integration (rch/src/hook.rs):
- Add execute_remote_compilation() to sync, execute, and retrieve artifacts
- Create TransferPipeline with project path and hash
- Stream stdout/stderr to agent via stderr
- Deny local execution after remote success/failure (prevents double execution)
- Fall back to local execution on pipeline failure (fail-open)

Bug Fixes:
- ssh.rs: Read stdout/stderr concurrently to prevent deadlock
- workers.rs: Implement proper len() with AtomicUsize counter
- workers.rs: Add interior mutability (RwLock) for status field
- workers.rs: Implement set_status() method properly
- workers.rs: Add all_workers() for health monitoring
- health.rs: Check ALL workers (not just healthy) for recovery

Closes: remote_compilation_helper-2ug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
